{"title": "My habits weren't helping — they were amplifying", "description": "Meditation sharpens the thinking. Better thinking makes the work easier. Better work proves the system matters — and that loop compounds literally, not abstractly. Once I saw this, everything changed. #PersonalDevelopment #HabitStacking #Shorts", "tags": ["habit stacking", "morning routine", "productivity", "self improvement", "compounding habits", "life habits", "behavior design"]}
